biological_replicate: Chlamydomonas strains The cell wall-less Chlamydomonas strain CW15- as well as the six other Chlamydomonas strains used in this study...
technical_replicate: Samples were injected in technical triplicates and separated through gradients...
experimental_design: We set out to undertake a new proteomic analysis of Chlamydomonas centrioles...
factor_value: we discovered that WDR90, the human homolog of POC16, localizes to a region of human centrioles...
number_of_fractions: twelve 500 μL fractions were collected and further analyzed by immunofluorescence.
